query: ("weather forecast"[Title/Abstract] OR "forecast intervention"[Title/Abstract] OR "meteorological forecast"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat forecast"[Title/Abstract] OR "temperature forecast"[Title/Abstract] OR "early warning system"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat warning"[Title/Abstract] OR "weather alert"[Title/Abstract] OR "climate alert"[Title/Abstract] OR "extreme heat warning"[Title/Abstract]) AND ("temperature-health"[Title/Abstract] OR "temperature-mortality"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat-health"[Title/Abstract] OR "thermal stress"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat-related illness"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat-related mortality"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat exhaustion"[Title/Abstract] OR hyperthermia[Title/Abstract] OR "heat stroke"[Title/Abstract] OR "cooling center"[Title/Abstract] OR "cooling centre"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat refuge"[Title/Abstract] OR "cooling shelter"[Title/Abstract] OR "emergency cooling"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat vulnerability"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat exposure"[Title/Abstract]) AND ("randomized controlled trial"[Title/Abstract] OR "randomised controlled trial"[Title/Abstract] OR RCT[Title/Abstract] OR "quasi-experimental"[Title/Abstract] OR "natural experiment"[Title/Abstract] OR "regression discontinuity"[Title/Abstract] OR "difference-in-differences"[Title/Abstract] OR "instrumental variable"[Title/Abstract] OR "causal inference"[Title/Abstract] OR "plausibly exogenous"[Title/Abstract] OR "random assignment"[Title/Abstract] OR "intervention study"[Title/Abstract] OR "impact evaluation"[Title/Abstract] OR "program evaluation"[Title/Abstract] OR "programme evaluation"[Title/Abstract] OR "treatment effect"[Title/Abstract] OR "counterfactual"[Title/Abstract] OR "propensity score"[Title/Abstract])
